---
title: "Elective Depth"
---

```{r library, include=FALSE}
library(knitr)
library(tidyverse)

setwd("D:/Portfolio/Data-Science/bac")

post_bac <- read_csv("./Post.csv")
tech <- read_csv("./Tech.csv")
```

## Applied Analysis

* [ ] BA 211 - Business Fundamentals (3)
* [ ] BA 215 - Spreadsheet Analysis (3)
* [ ] BA 315 - Business Analytics (3)
* [X] CIT 380 - Project Management (3)
* [ ] CIT 381 - Business Intel (3)
* [ ] ECON 388 - Introduction to Econometrics (3)
* [ ] MATH 326 - Experimental Design (3)

## Database Depth

* [X] CIT 111 - Intro to Databases (3)
* [X] CIT 225 - Database Design & Development (3)
* [ ] CIT 325 - Database Programming (3)
* [ ] CIT 326 - Database Admin (3)
* [ ] CIT 327 - Data Warehousing (3)

## Programming Depth

### General

* [X] CSE 121C - C Language
* [X] CSE 210 - Programming with Classes (3)
* [X] CSE 212 - Programming with Data Structures (3)
* [X] CSE 220C - C++ Language
* [X] CSE 310 - Applied Programming (3)
* [ ] CSE 471 - Human Computer Interaction (3)

### Algorithms

* [ ] CSE 121a - Clojure Language (3)
* [ ] CSE 180 - Algorithmic Thinking (3)
* [ ] CSE 381 - Algorithms and Complexity (3)
* [ ] CSE 480 - Computational Theory (3)

### Design

* [ ] CSE 130 - Algorithm Design (2)
* [ ] CSE 131 - Modularization Design (2)
* [ ] CSE 232 - Designing Data Structures (2)
* [ ] CSE 270 - Software Testing (3)

### Web Development

* [ ] CIT 365 - .NET Software Development (3)
* [ ] CSE 121b - JavaScript (1)
* [ ] CSE 340 - Backend Web Development I (3)
* [ ] CSE 341 - Backend Web Development II (3)
* [X] WDD 130 - Web Fundamentals (2)
* [ ] WDD 230 - Frontend Web Development I (3)
* [ ] WDD 330 - Frontend Web Development II (3)
* [ ] WDD 331 - Advanced CSS (2)
* [ ] WDD 430 - Web Full-Stack Development (3)

## Mathematics 

### General

* [X] MATH 112 - Calculus I (4)
* [ ] MATH 113 - Calculus II (3)
* [ ] MATH 119 - Data Calculus (4) 
* [ ] MATH 214 - Multivariable and Vector Calculus (3) 
* [ ] MATH 215 - Multivariable Calculus (4)
* [ ] MATH 316 - Differential Equations (4)

### Discrete and Computational 

* [X] CSE 280 - Discrete Mathematics I (2)
* [ ] CSE 380 - Discrete Mathematics II (4)
* [ ] MATH 241 - Linear Algebra Fundamentals (2)
* [X] MATH 341 - Linear Algebra (3)
* [ ] MATH 411 - Numerical Methods 1 (3)

### Applied 

* [ ] MATH 275 - Mathematics Connections (3)
* [ ] MATH 282 - Fundamentals of Mathematical Modeling (2)
* [ ] MATH 440 - Modern Algebra (3)
* [ ] MATH 441 - Abstract Algebra I (3)
* [ ] MATH 461 - Real Analysis I (3)

### Statistics

* [X] CSE 150 - Data Intuition and Insight (2)
* [ ] MATH 221 - Statistics (3)
* [ ] MATH 283 - Modeling Probability (2)
* [ ] MATH 325 - Intermediate Stats (3)
* [ ] MATH 423 - Probability and Statistics (3)
* [ ] MATH 424 - Mathematical and Bayesian Statistics (3)
